honesty.doClaim: Ranks and guidance are verified to the 2026-07-22 frozen source packet.
honesty.doNotClaim: Fairy has only eight qualifying released Shadow attackers; empty slots are not Pokémon recommendations. PvP rank-1 stat product is not guaranteed matchup-optimal. Stagger timing is not guaranteed.

preserve-practical-publish-optimal-v1.rationale: Keep the frozen practical ranking moveset and metric unchanged for auditability while publishing a separate maximum-neutral-DPS legal same-type moveset for standardized comparison.

raidDps.description: Long-run same-type cycle DPS at Level 40 with 15 attack IV. Fast and charged damage are rounded independently for each effectiveness state before cycle damage is divided by cycle time.

FUTURE_SIGHT.rationale: PvPoke uses FUTURE_SIGHT while the frozen Game Master uses FUTURESIGHT for the same PvE move.

PYRO_BALL.rationale: PvPoke uses PYRO_BALL while the frozen Game Master uses PYROBALL for the same PvE move.

DYNAMAX_CANNON.rationale: The practical Pokebattler and PvPoke form sources reference DYNAMAX_CANNON, while the frozen Game Master has no moveSettings record for it.

GLAIVE_RUSH.rationale: The practical Pokebattler and PvPoke form sources reference GLAIVE_RUSH, while the frozen Game Master has no moveSettings record for it.

PLASMA_FISTS.rationale: The practical Pokebattler and PvPoke form sources reference PLASMA_FISTS, while the frozen Game Master has no moveSettings record for it.

HIDDEN_POWER_FIRE.rationale: PvPoke records this individual's form-legal typed Hidden Power identity; the frozen Game Master supplies the shared PvE power, energy, and duration under HIDDEN_POWER_FAST.

HIDDEN_POWER_FLYING.rationale: PvPoke records this individual's form-legal typed Hidden Power identity; the frozen Game Master supplies the shared PvE power, energy, and duration under HIDDEN_POWER_FAST.

HIDDEN_POWER_ICE.rationale: PvPoke records this individual's form-legal typed Hidden Power identity; the frozen Game Master supplies the shared PvE power, energy, and duration under HIDDEN_POWER_FAST.

raidDps.practicalMoveCatalogCaveat: 3 practical recommendations are source-backed but lack frozen GM move stats; standardized DPS uses separate GM-backed optimal moves.

DYNAMAX_CANNON.rationale: The practical Pokebattler and PvPoke form sources reference DYNAMAX_CANNON, while the frozen Game Master has no moveSettings record for it.

GLAIVE_RUSH.rationale: The practical Pokebattler and PvPoke form sources reference GLAIVE_RUSH, while the frozen Game Master has no moveSettings record for it.
